mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tin_nhan_chat WHERE (ma_nguoi_gui = #{maA} AND ma_nguoi_nhan = #{maB}) OR (ma_nguoi_gui = #{maB} AND ma_nguoi_nhan = #{maA}) ORDER BY thoi_gian_tao ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tin_nhan_chat (ma_nguoi_gui, ma_nguoi_nhan, noi_dung, da_doc_nhan) VALUES (#{maNguoiGui}, #{maNguoiNhan}, #{noiDung}, COALESCE(#{daDocNhan}, 0))
